Elaine Wang of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith, LLP, 362-2580, appearing for defendant and moving party
Thomas Ehrlich, 408-298-2220, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

This matter was argued as to service only. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LYCEE FRANCAIS LA PEROUSE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied for insufficient service. Served by mail November 22, 2006; earliest hearing date could be December 26, 2006. Defendant to respond to the complaint within 10 days. Prevailing party may prepare form of order. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604
